raw.check_title: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to port 22
raw.status_extended: Security group sg-0prod1234 (web-servers) allows unrestricted SSH (0.0.0.0/0:22).
raw.description: Checks whether security groups allow unrestricted inbound access on TCP port 22 (SSH).
raw.risk: Unrestricted SSH access allows anyone to attempt brute-force login to EC2 instances.
raw.remediation_text: Restrict SSH ingress to specific trusted IP ranges. Remove the 0.0.0.0/0 rule.

audit_trail.reason: Grouped 2 instance(s) of check_id='ec2_securitygroup_allow_ingress_from_internet_to_tcp_port_22' into one output row
Category override: 'internet-exposed' in categories_list forces Likelihood=High (base was High from severity='critical')

raw.check_title: Ensure EC2 instances use IMDSv2
raw.status_extended: Instance i-0aabbccdd does not enforce IMDSv2.
raw.description: Checks whether EC2 instances are configured to use Instance Metadata Service Version 2.
raw.risk: IMDSv1 is susceptible to SSRF attacks that can expose IAM credentials.
raw.remediation_text: Enforce IMDSv2 on all EC2 instances by setting HttpTokens to required.

audit_trail.reason: Grouped 1 instance(s) of check_id='ec2_instance_imdsv2_enabled' into one output row

raw.check_title: Ensure EBS volumes are encrypted
raw.status_extended: EBS volume vol-0aaa1111 is not encrypted.
raw.description: Checks whether EBS volumes are encrypted.
raw.risk: Unencrypted EBS volumes may expose sensitive data if the underlying hardware is compromised.
raw.remediation_text: Create an encrypted snapshot and replace the unencrypted volume.

raw.status_extended: CloudTrail trail management-trail is not enabled in all regions.
